session.assistant:
There are many test files. I need to be careful about scope — many of these files reference `plan_id` for erk_shared APIs (like `save_plan_ref(plan_id=)`) or are in the land pipeline (node 3.6.1, out of scope). Let me narrow down to only the in-scope test files mentioned in the plan.
The plan specifies: 1. Submit pipeline tests (15 files in `tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/`) 2. PlanContext tests (3 files): - `tests/core/test_plan_context_provider.py` - `tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_shared.py` - `tests/core/test_commit_message_generator.py` 3. `tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_dispatch_cmd.py` (function rename)
Let me use a bulk rename approach with libcst-refactor for the submit pipeline tests since they all follow a similar pattern (`plan_id=` → `pr_id=` in `SubmitState` kwargs and `.plan_id` → `.pr_id` assertions):

tool_use.name: Task
tool_use.param: Bulk rename plan_id in submit pipeline tests

I need you to do bulk renames across test files for a plan→pr terminology migration. This ...[truncated 2762 chars]...argeted edits.

30→ """Wrap a URL in terminal hyperlink escape sequences.""" 31→ styled = click.style(url, fg="cyan", underline=True) 32→ return f"\033]8;;{url}\033\\{styled}\033]8;;\033\\" 33→ 34→ 35→def _format_field(label: str, value: str) -> str: 36→ """Format a field with dimmed label and consistent width.""" 37→ label_width = 12 38→ styled_label = click.style(f"{label}:".ljust(label_width), dim=True) 39→ return f" {styled_label} {value}" 40→ 41→ 42→def _print_summary(result: SubmitState) -> None: 43→ """Print structured summary after successful PR submission.""" 44→ action = "Created" if result.was_created else "Updated" 45→ pr_label = f"PR #{result.pr_number}" if result.pr_number else "PR" 46→ 47→ click.echo(click.style("✅ PR submitted", bold=True)) 48→ click.echo("") 49→ click.echo(_format_field("Action", f"{action} {pr_label}")) 50→ 51→ base = result.base_branch or result.parent_branch 52→ click.echo(_format_field("Branch", f"{result.branch_name} → {base}")) 53→ 54→ if result.title: 55→ click.echo(_format_field("Title", result.title)) 56→ 57→ if result.pr_url: 58→ click.echo(_format_field("PR", _make_clickable(result.pr_url))) 59→

[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_prepare_state.py","old_string":"def _make_state(
    *,
    cwd: Path,
    repo_root: Path | None = None,
    branch_name: str = "",
    parent_branch: str = "",
    trunk_branch: str = "",
    use_graphite: bool = False,
    force: bool = False,
    debug: bool = False,
    session_id: str = "test-session",
    plan_id: str | None = None,
    pr_number: int | None = None,
    pr_url: str | None = None,
    was_created: bool = False,
    base_branch: str | None = None,
    graphite_url: str | None = None,
    diff_file: Path | None = None,
    plan_context: None = None,
    title: str | None = None,
    body: str | None = None,
) -> SubmitState:
    return SubmitState(
        cwd=cwd,
        repo_root=repo_root if repo_root is not None else cwd,
        branch_name=branch_name,
        parent_branch=parent_branch,
        trunk_branch=trunk_branch,
        use_graphite=use_graphite,
        force=force,
        debug=debug,
        session_id=session_id,
        skip_description=False,
        quiet=False,
        plan_id=plan_id,
        pr_number=pr_number,
        pr_url=pr_url,
        was_created=was_created,
        base_branch=base_branch,
        graphite_url=graphite_url,
        diff_file=diff_file,
        plan_context=plan_context,
        title=title,
        body=body,
        existing_pr_body="",
        graphite_is_authed=None,
        graphite_branch_tracked=None,
    )","new_string":"def _make_state(
    *,
    cwd: Path,
    repo_root: Path | None = None,
    branch_name: str = "",
    parent_branch: str = "",
    trunk_branch: str = "",
    use_graphite: bool = False,
    force: bool = False,
    debug: bool = False,
    session_id: str = "test-session",
    pr_id: str | None = None,
    pr_number: int | None = None,
    pr_url: str | None = None,
    was_created: bool = False,
    base_branch: str | None = None,
    graphite_url: str | None = None,
    diff_file: Path | None = None,
    plan_context: None = None,
    title: str | None = None,
    body: str | None = None,
) -> SubmitState:
    return SubmitState(
        cwd=cwd,
        repo_root=repo_root if repo_root is not None else cwd,
        branch_name=branch_name,
        parent_branch=parent_branch,
        trunk_branch=trunk_branch,
        use_graphite=use_graphite,
        force=force,
        debug=debug,
        session_id=session_id,
        skip_description=False,
        quiet=False,
        pr_id=pr_id,
        pr_number=pr_number,
        pr_url=pr_url,
        was_created=was_created,
        base_branch=base_branch,
        graphite_url=graphite_url,
        diff_file=diff_file,
        plan_context=plan_context,
        title=title,
        body=body,
        existing_pr_body="",
        graphite_is_authed=None,
        graphite_branch_tracked=None,
    )"}

[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_finalize_pr.py","old_string":"def _make_state(
    *,
    cwd: Path,
    repo_root: Path | None = None,
    branch_name: str = "feature",
    parent_branch: str = "main",
    trunk_branch: str = "main",
    use_graphite: bool = False,
    force: bool = False,
    debug: bool = False,
    session_id: str = "test-session",
    skip_description: bool = False,
    plan_id: str | None = None,
    pr_number: int | None = 42,
    pr_url: str | None = "https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/42",
    was_created: bool = True,
    base_branch: str | None = "main",
    graphite_url: str | None = None,
    diff_file: Path | None = None,
    plan_context: PlanContext | None = None,
    title: str | None = "My PR Title",
    body: str | None = "My PR body",
    existing_pr_body: str = "",
) -> SubmitState:
    return SubmitState(
        cwd=cwd,
        repo_root=repo_root if repo_root is not None else cwd,
        branch_name=branch_name,
        parent_branch=parent_branch,
        trunk_branch=trunk_branch,
        use_graphite=use_graphite,
        force=force,
        debug=debug,
        session_id=session_id,
        skip_description=skip_description,
        quiet=False,
        plan_id=plan_id,
        pr_number=pr_number,
        pr_url=pr_url,
        was_created=was_created,
        base_branch=base_branch,
        graphite_url=graphite_url,
        diff_file=diff_file,
        plan_context=plan_context,
        title=title,
        body=body,
        existing_pr_body=existing_pr_body,
        graphite_is_authed=None,
        graphite_branch_tracked=None,
    )","new_string":"def _make_state(
    *,
    cwd: Path,
    repo_root: Path | None = None,
    branch_name: str = "feature",
    parent_branch: str = "main",
    trunk_branch: str = "main",
    use_graphite: bool = False,
    force: bool = False,
    debug: bool = False,
    session_id: str = "test-session",
    skip_description: bool = False,
    pr_id: str | None = None,
    pr_number: int | None = 42,
    pr_url: str | None = "https://github.com/owner/repo/pull/42",
    was_created: bool = True,
    base_branch: str | None = "main",
    graphite_url: str | None = None,
    diff_file: Path | None = None,
    plan_context: PlanContext | None = None,
    title: str | None = "My PR Title",
    body: str | None = "My PR body",
    existing_pr_body: str = "",
) -> SubmitState:
    return SubmitState(
        cwd=cwd,
        repo_root=repo_root if repo_root is not None else cwd,
        branch_name=branch_name,
        parent_branch=parent_branch,
        trunk_branch=trunk_branch,
        use_graphite=use_graphite,
        force=force,
        debug=debug,
        session_id=session_id,
        skip_description=skip_description,
        quiet=False,
        pr_id=pr_id,
        pr_number=pr_number,
        pr_url=pr_url,
        was_created=was_created,
        base_branch=base_branch,
        graphite_url=graphite_url,
        diff_file=diff_file,
        plan_context=plan_context,
        title=title,
        body=body,
        existing_pr_body=existing_pr_body,
        graphite_is_authed=None,
        graphite_branch_tracked=None,
    )"}
</output>
